wordplay_note: One of the soldiers who may or may not be human
card_description: Klaus is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Second Variety*. Soldier whose humanity is uncertain among autonomous killing machines. Name note: One of the soldiers who may or may not be human. The impossibility of distinguishing human from machine in a war zone. First appears in *Second Variety*.

reference.brief: Soldier whose humanity is uncertain among autonomous killing machines
reference.significance: The impossibility of distinguishing human from machine in a war zone
